WARNING: These diagnostic steps are for A2337 (820-02016) MacBook Air 13" M1 ONLY. NO MagSafe; two USB-C ports only. PMU naming: SERA=Master (U8100), SIMETRA=Slave (U7700). Test points are BOARD-SPECIFIC; do NOT use A2681 (M2) component designators.

scenarios.meaning: Board powered at 5V via USB-C DCPS without PD negotiation. Tests initial power chain through to PMU startup. At 5V, charger IC should activate and produce PPBUS_AON if battery is connected.

steps.measure: Probe VBUS pins on USB-C connector (page 57)
steps.if_missing: USB-C connector damage or CD3217 fault. Inspect USB-C connector for physical damage. Check CC1/CC2 lines for shorts to ground. Check UF400 (ATC0) or UF500 (ATC1) for shorts. Measure diode mode on VBUS pins.

steps.measure: Probe bulk capacitor near U5200 charger IC output
steps.if_missing: Charger IC (U5200) not converting, or battery SYS_DETECT not triggered. Check BMU connector (J5100) SYS_DETECT gasket (page 22). Check CHGR_AUX_OK signal (page 24). Check charger IC U5200 input pins for 5V. Check for shorts on PPBUS_AON bulk caps.

steps.measure: Probe bulk capacitor on PP3V8_AON output near U5700
steps.if_missing: U5700 SVR AON not starting. Check PPVAON_PWR_EN (delayed by D5340/D5345, page 24). Check PPVAON_FAULT_L (if low, U5700 fault). Check for shorts on PP3V8_AON_VDDMAIN. Check U5910 current sense amplifier. Diode mode on PP3V8_AON output caps.

steps.measure: Probe output capacitors of UC100 (CC101) and UC120 (CC121) on page 36
steps.if_missing: AON LDO failure. Check PP3V8_AON_VODMAN input to LDOs. If PP3V3_AON missing: UC100 fault or output shorted. If PP1V8_AON missing: UC120 fault or output shorted. Diode mode on LDO output caps.

steps.action: Check SERA (U8100) and SIMETRA (U7700) PMU outputs
steps.expected: SERA LDO9=~1.8V (ACTIVE), SIMETRA LDO9=~1.8V (ACTIVE), SERA LDO10=present
steps.if_missing: PMU not starting or output shorted. Check PP3V8_AON_VDDMAIN input to PMUs. Use thermal imaging to find hot component. If hot chip found: replace. If no hot chip: PMU IC may be dead (replace U8100 or U7700).

steps.measure: Probe output capacitors of UC300 (page 38) and UC710 (page 39)
steps.if_missing: Standalone VR not enabled or faulty. Check P5VS2_PWR_EN and P3V3S2_PWR_EN enable signals. If enable present but no output: VR IC fault. Check for shorts on output rail. Check inductor continuity.
